title: [IOS] Location Sharing Dialogue - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow While Using App
scenario: Verify that after denying location permission during onboarding, the user can grant "While Using the App" permission via phone settings and return to see the Find My Device screen without the permission prompt.
steps: Start from the state where 'Don't Allow' was selected during onboarding.
Navigate to Find My Device via the hamburger menu.
Grant 'While Using the App' permission in phone settings.
Verify the FMD screen is displayed without the permission window.
expected: The FMD screen is displayed without the permission window.
